nasb.text: ‘Do not speak out,’ so they speak out. But if they do not speak out concerning these things, Reproaches will not be turned back.

esv.text: “Do not preach”—thus they preach— “one should not preach of such things; disgrace will not overtake us.”

cnv.text: 有人預言說：“你們不要說預言； 人不可預言這些事； 羞恥不會臨到我們。”

ccb.text: 他们的先知说： “不要说预言了， 不要预言这种事， 我们不会蒙受羞辱。”
